mainEntity.name: How much does a panel upgrade cost in Akron?

acceptedAnswer.text: A 200-amp panel upgrade in Akron typically costs $2,750, including the panel, breakers, permits, and labor

mainEntity.name: How much does it cost to rewire a house in Akron?

acceptedAnswer.text: Whole house rewiring in Akron ranges from $1,850 to $15,500 depending on home size, number of circuits, and accessibility of wiring
